title: Selenipedium × giganteum
taxonomy: Selenipedium × giganteum is a hybrid species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a cross between two species of Selenipedium, specifically Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium ishpinguense. This hybrid orchid is known for its large flowers and is native to South America. The classification of Selenipedium × giganteum as a hybrid species is due to its unique characteristics and genetic makeup. It is often cultivated and bred in orchid gardens for its striking appearance.
uses: Selenipedium × giganteum, a hybrid species of the orchid genus, has been traditionally used in folk medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
